name: Meadows Golf Club
address: 7007 Meadows Golf Club Dr, Littleton, CO 80127
about: Meadows Golf Club, operated by the Foothills Park & Recreation District, is a public golf facility featuring a championship 18-hole course. It also offers a golf simulator experience at its sister location, Foothills Golf Course. The simulator, a Golfzon system, provides an indoor option for practice, play, and training, available for booking by the hour with dynamic pricing. The facility includes amenities like a pro shop, rental clubs, and restaurant access, catering to golfers of all skill levels seeking a convenient and weather-independent golfing experience.
why_golfers_like_it: All-weather play, unaffected by rain, snow, or extreme heat
Efficient use of time, allowing for a full round in a fraction of the time on a traditional course
Convenient food and drink delivery directly to the simulator bay
Beginner-friendly environment to learn the game without pressure
Availability of rental clubs for those who do not have their own

food_and_drink.notes: Restaurant available; food can be delivered to the simulator bay
Restaurant available; drinks can be delivered to the simulator bay

simulator_hardware.notes: A cutting-edge indoor system offering an ultra-realistic golfing experience

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, you can bring your own clubs, but they must have clean clubfaces to avoid damaging the impact screen. Rental clubs, including left-handed, right-handed, men's, and women's options, are available from the pro shop if you do not have your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted. However, food and beverages can be ordered from the Foothills Restaurant and delivered directly to your simulator bay.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: A full round on the simulator can be completed in a fraction of the time it takes on a traditional green grass course, making it ideal for busy schedules.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the simulator is described as a space that is fun for all ages, including kids learning the basics, and provides a stress-free environment for families to play together.
